headline: Soaring Mortgage Rates Hit US Homebuilders: One Building ETF Still Wins
summary: Mortgage rates hit 6.75%, hurting US homebuilders, while one construction ETF gains from booming AI and infrastructure demand.

headline: Will Mortgage Rates Hit 7% As Borrowing Costs Keep Climbing?
summary: Mortgage rates hit 6.75% as Kobeissi warned inflation and Treasury yields could push rates above 7%.
